slices.description: Add SessionV3 interface and supporting types (TableOfContentsEntry, PurposeClass, counters) to types.ts. Mark SessionV2 as deprecated.
acceptance: SessionV3 has semanticSessionId, lineage, purposeClass, counters, toc fields

slices.description: Add initSessionV3() to consolidated-writer.ts. Update path generation to create directory-per-session instead of flat file. Keep initSession() backward-compatible.
acceptance: Directory created automatically if not exists

slices.description: New session-structure.ts module: directory creation helpers, subsession linking (linkSubSession), path resolution (getSessionDir, getSubsessionDir). Pure FS operations, no markdown.
New markdown-writer.ts: append-only events.md generation. Writes session header, turn entries, diagnostics section. Prunes tool payloads to name+result only.
acceptance: writeSessionHeader() creates events.md with metadata block
appendToolInvocation() logs tool name + key result (not full JSON)

slices.description: TOC generation on session close: reads events.md turns, generates TableOfContentsEntry[], writes back into session.json. Called once, not incremental.
acceptance: Returns array of TableOfContentsEntry with correct fields
TOC written to session.json on closeSessionV3()

slices.description: Update chat-message-handler.ts to call initSessionV3() for new sessions and appendTurn() for user messages.
acceptance: New sessions use initSessionV3() instead of initSession()
User messages appended to events.md via appendTurn()
No regression in existing chat flow

slices.description: Update text-complete-handler.ts to append assistant outputs and model metadata to events.md.
acceptance: Assistant outputs appended to events.md with model/duration metadata
No regression in text completion flow

slices.description: Update event-handler.ts for session lifecycle events. NEW tool-execution-handler.ts for tool invocation logging to events.md (pruned format).
acceptance: event-handler emits session start/end to events.md
tool-execution-handler logs tool name + result summary (not full JSON)

slices.description: Update compaction-handler.ts to log compaction events to events.md and increment compactionCount in session.json.
New scripts/migrate-session-hierarchy.ts: one-time migration of flat JSON files to directory structure. Idempotent, generates events.md from historical data, prunes during migration.
acceptance: Reads all flat ses_*.json files from .hivemind/sessions/

slices.description: End-to-end integration tests: full session lifecycle through new hierarchy. Verify directory structure, subsession nesting, markdown readability, backward-compat API, and pruning.
acceptance: events.md is parsable markdown with TOC and turn boundaries
Old API (initSession, addTurn, addEvent) still functional
Tool payloads are NOT full JSON dumps in events.md
